title: Validation Evidence
purpose: Prove the daemon-side validation truth source, command gate, and transition mapping without claiming task FSM or security policy ownership.

facts.name: agent completion is not final completion
facts.summary: Provider completed result moves task DB work to Validating, not Completed.

facts.name: daemon measured exit code is truth source
facts.summary: Validation command is executed by the daemon through /bin/sh -lc and exit code maps to passed or failed.

facts.name: deterministic gate defaults
facts.summary: Default gate is deterministic-command-exit-code.v1 and default timeout is five minutes.

facts.name: timeout is failed evidence
facts.summary: Validation timeout records exit code 124 and therefore failed.

facts.name: guarded evidence mutation
facts.summary: Validation appends guarded task evidence using command id, provider, decision LLM, and approval id.

facts.name: passed transition mapping
facts.summary: Passed validation from Validating appends ValidationPassed and moves to PatchReady.

facts.name: failed transition mapping
facts.summary: Failed validation from Validating appends ValidationFailed and moves to Failed.

facts.name: non-validating tasks keep state
facts.summary: Validation evidence can be recorded for non-Validating tasks, but no transition is appended.

facts.name: local API uses same runner
facts.summary: The validate API delegates to taskvalidation.Run and persists the resulting task DB.

boundaries.name: task FSM and IR catalog
boundaries.summary: Task states and validation event vocabulary are imported contracts, not defined here.

boundaries.name: security policy selection
boundaries.summary: Validation executes requested rules; it does not define protected paths, secret-scan policy, or diff policy.

boundaries.name: provider runtime execution
boundaries.summary: Validation runs deterministic commands and records evidence; provider process/session ownership stays outside C8.

boundaries.name: final completion approval
boundaries.summary: PatchReady to Completed is outside validation's sole authority.

absent_surfaces.name: validation direct completed transition
absent_surfaces.reason: validation must not directly mark task completion

assertions: Validation reader doc must be generated from this manifest.
Every implemented fact must point at local source evidence.
Validation must not directly claim final Completed authority.
